results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Staged RL phases for multimodal reasoning IS the 5-stage skill-ladder + transition graduation paradigm.
Multi-modal staged training for vision + reasoning + tool integration IS the multi-modal flow-drill curriculum paradigm.
Curriculum gradually tightens constraints + smoother transition IS the pace-locked threshold-graduated acceleration paradigm.
EXACT TWIN — CAMPUS competence-aware curriculum with dynamic difficulty + adversarial scoring IS the mastery-threshold pace-lock mechanism.
PCuRL three-stage easy/medium/hard with soft-weighting IS the staged ladder + threshold transition paradigm.
Probabilistic easy-to-hard scheduler IS the threshold-gated stage progression paradigm.
Easy-to-hard CoT data synthesis IS the staged synthesis paradigm for ladder curriculum.
Multi-token prediction pretraining curriculum covers staged multi-modal token-level skill ladder.
